chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4208 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 27.8.2025 Mr. Rehan Kayani advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
